name: 13"x 20" Outdoor Throw Pillow Yellow/Green: Fade-Resistant, Nature Theme, Recycled Polyester, Animal Icon Pattern
description:
Add a little character with the fun, casual pattern of this cushion. It features country cottage style beige gingham fabric that adds texture and dimension to any decor. Corded trim is a polished finishing touch.

Length 3 inches
Width 20 inches
Height 13 inches
Weight 1.1 pounds If you’re not satisfied with any Target Owned Brand item, return it within one year with a receipt for an exchange or a refund.
